name: AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc.
business: AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. is a technology infrastructure company focused on the convergence of artificial intelligence and blockchain-based programmable systems. The company develops software platforms for tokenization of real-world assets and deployment of Embodied Artificial Intelligence in commercial environments. It generates revenue through platform licensing, structuring and transaction fees, and ecosystem participation.

exposures.sentence: AIxC develops and operates software infrastructure for the digitization of traditional assets onto distributed ledger networks.
The Company's EAI pillar is focused on building the execution and monetization layer for AI-enabled physical systems.

Our initial commercial application involves a $10 million strategic equity investment in common stock of Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI), which is currently anticipated to close before March 31, 2026.

AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: AIXC) ( AIxC, we, us, or the Company ) is a technology infrastructure company focused on the convergence of artificial intelligence and blockchain-based programmable systems.
We are exposed to significant digital asset price volatility.

catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, the Company closed a $41 million PIPE financing and subsequently , in November 2025, rebranded from Qualigen Therapeutics to AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: AIXC).

catalysts.event: Rebranded from Qualigen Therapeutics to AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: in November 2025, rebranded from Qualigen Therapeutics to AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: AIXC).

catalysts.event: $10 million strategic equity investment in Faraday Future expected to close
catalysts.sentence: Our initial commercial application involves a $10 million strategic equity investment in common stock of Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI), which is currently anticipated to close before March 31, 2026.
On January 15, 2026, AIxC announced that AIxC Hub exceeded 500,000 registered wallets and 200,000 daily active participants in the first week following the launch.

catalysts.event: AIxC Hub surpassed 1 million registered wallets
catalysts.sentence: On February 2, 2026, AIxC Hub surpassed 1 million registered wallets and launched Tenk, a new AI-;powered interactive game further enhancing user retention.

catalysts.event: Strategic partnership with BitMart to launch co-branded virtual prepaid card
catalysts.sentence: On February 12, 2026, we announced a strategic partnership with BitMart to launch a co-branded virtual prepaid card.

tamClaims.claim: Blockchain adoption from $41 billion in 2025 to $1.9 trillion by 2034 (50%+ CAGR)
tamClaims.sentence: Blockchain adoption is accelerating across industries from roughly $41 billion in 2025 to approximately $1.9 trillion by 2034, representing more than a 50% compound annual growth rate.

tamClaims.claim: On-chain RWA market $20 billion in 2025, projected to reach many trillions
tamClaims.sentence: The on-chain RWA market has grown to more than $20 billion in 2025, a more than 300% increase over three years, with some forecasts projecting tokenized assets reaching many trillions within a decade.

tamClaims.claim: Global AI Agent market $7 billion today, projected to exceed $47 billion by 2030 (45% CAGR)
tamClaims.sentence: The global AI Agent market is approximately $7 billion today and is projected to exceed $47 billion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate of nearly 45%.
